grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Provides a comprehensive 10-item checklist in clear table format with status tracking

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: References Stage B (Pre-Exchange), Stage C, and specific paragraph numbers throughout

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: All key items explicitly covered: searches currency (item 1), mortgage offer (item 2), deposit (item 3), insurance (item 4), signed contracts (item 5)

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Explicitly references Law Society Conveyancing Protocol (2019 edition) and includes specific protocol paragraph references for each item
